_comment: ADR-style decision log. Agent reads this at start of every run so Wenxuan never has to repeat a preference. One entry per decision with question, choice, rationale, timestamp.

decisions.question: How should the agent pick the paper of the day?
decisions.detail: Serve 2 papers when possible: one newer (≤7 days) for freshness + one fit-to-MAE for depth. When only one slot, alternate day-by-day.

decisions.question: Which sources for the daily 3 trends?
decisions.detail: Rotate: HN front page top, r/LocalLLaMA + r/singularity hot, Product Hunt daily. Pick 3 best across all sources, not 1 from each (signal > balance).

decisions.question: How often to include review-points section?
decisions.detail: Every brief has between 1 and 3 review items. If nothing real is pending, surface a low-stakes check-in question rather than leaving empty.

decisions.question: Default theme?
decisions.detail: Auto-follow OS preference with a manual toggle button in header. Persist user override in localStorage.

decisions.question: Which inner pages ship first?
decisions.detail: Ship /papers/*, /learning/*, /projects/*, /experiments/* TODAY. /feedback also goes in as Q2 already needs it.

decisions.question: Daytime learning cadence?
decisions.detail: Cron at 12:00 and 17:00 on weekdays. Additionally: when agent finishes a task and has spare cycles (no pending user/implementation work), trigger a learning run.

decisions.question: Night builder autonomy?
decisions.detail: Open draft PRs freely on side-project repos. Ask before merging. Never force-push to main.

decisions.question: Cron location?
decisions.detail: Primary: macOS launchd on Wenxuan's laptop. Supplementary: GitHub Actions for always-on tasks (morning brief fallback, night-builder when laptop asleep).

decisions.question: Daily token budget?
decisions.detail: No fixed daily cap. On rate-limit hit, pause the mode and surface in next brief as review-point. Log tokens per run in agent-journal.jsonl for visibility.

decisions.question: Merge Crumbs PR #1 (social meta + OG image)?
decisions.detail: User approved 2026-04-22. Merged via `gh pr merge --squash --delete-branch`. Merge commit 66ccce6. v2-identity-card now contains the OG improvements.

decisions.question: How to bootstrap personal site?
decisions.detail: One repo for self-discovery (private docs) + self-presentation (public site). site/ dir, Astro static, Vercel deploy, .vercelignore protects private dirs.

decisions.question: Can the agent cite the CVPR 2026 / Confined Vibe / first-author claim?
decisions.detail: Wenxuan flagged the claim as fake. Agent removed it from BedRock/site. Stale sources still contain it: wenxuan.surge.sh (live portfolio), portfolio/portfolio-content.md, ONBOARDING.md, INSTRUCTIONS.md, context/my-background.md, context/jd-2-*.md, fact-sheets/research-3d-scene.md. Memory entry updated with permanent TRUTH RULE.

decisions.decision: Each day, pick exactly ONE side project to evolve. Morning brief names it (field: side_project_of_day). Night-builder only touches that repo. All others frozen until next day.
decisions.rationale: Avoid context switching across Crumbs / BedRock / morning-brief / Gestgo. Day-job MAE is separate.

decisions.question: Deploy BedRock Astro site to Vercel?
decisions.detail: User will provide a Vercel token from vercel.com/account/tokens for deployment.

decisions.question: Prototype the self-evolving persona system (v0, ~10h)?
decisions.detail: Full v0 build: episodic event log → nightly distillation cron → persona core → /persona viewer.

decisions.question: Draft a Crumbs landing-page polish PR (~90 min)?
decisions.detail: Gradient overlay, value-prop H1, CTA copy rewrite — full PR.

decisions.question: Review the 'Context, not Control' essay
decisions.detail: Merge BedRock PR #2 and publish the writing section.
